edges.reason: The decision establishes the reusable project lesson for future pitches and roadmap work.
The generated artifacts are checked through compile, memory validation, doctor, and docs tests.
The goal is implemented through optional proof-oriented add-ons rather than core behavior changes.
The idea became a concrete implementation plan with QA gates and generated artifacts.
The plan requires installing the optional kits into the Owledge project itself and rendering their outputs.
QA passing supports shipping these capabilities as optional add-ons and skills.
Generated benchmark, trace, positioning, and hub outputs prove the installation works locally.
This becomes the first PI intelligence idea and should compare future ideas against it.
Inferred read-only phase edge for visual trace continuity.
